_meta.description: First live Shopify deployment stage (Phase 7B.1). Consumes store_blueprint to create or update products and collections in a Shopify store via the Admin API. Safety-first: no deletes, upsert by handle, all new products created as drafts.

constraints: products must be a non-empty array

from_pipeline.notes: shop_url may be under key STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL in cloud mode (smoke_test_config)

environment.description: Shopify store domain (e.g. my-store.myshopify.com). Set in env (self-hosted) or smoke_test_config (cloud).
Shopify Admin API version (e.g. 2025-01). Defaults to 2025-01 if not set.

execution_model.pattern: Subworkflow — called as executeWorkflow from orchestrate-phase1

shopify_catalog_deployment.description: Deployment summary. Returned inline — no filesystem writes.

safety_guarantees: No Shopify resources are ever deleted — only POST (create) and PUT (update) operations are performed
Upsert by handle: existing handles are updated, new handles are created
All new products are created with status: 'draft' — never auto-published
continueOnFail: true on all HTTP nodes — individual API errors are collected, not fatal
neverError: true on HTTP nodes — HTTP 4xx/5xx return as items, not exceptions

upsert_logic.collections: GET existing custom_collections → index by handle → if handle exists: PUT (update), else POST (create)
upsert_logic.products: GET existing products (status=active,draft) → index by handle → if handle exists: PUT (update), else POST (create)
upsert_logic.handle_derivation: store_blueprint handle field used directly if present; otherwise derived from title: lowercase, non-alphanumeric replaced with hyphens

validation_errors.description: store_blueprint is absent from trigger input.
store_blueprint.products is not a non-empty array.
shop_url not found in runtime_config. STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL must be configured.

cloud_behavior.notes: Fully cloud-compatible. All Shopify API calls use shopifyOAuth2Api credential injected by n8n. No filesystem access or AJV validation required.

primary: orchestrate-phase1 — Phase 7B.1 bridge node reads shopify_catalog_deployment.status to gate continuation
Phase 7B.2 (planned) — build-shopify-pages: deploys About, FAQ, Contact pages
